providers.name: Rock Jam Music School
providers.city: Amersham (covers Chalfont, Beaconsfield, Chesham, High Wycombe, Berkhamsted)
providers.notes: Closest rock-focused school to Welders House — every lesson ends in a 10-min live jam session; ages 7-18. Huge Ozzy/Sabbath-legacy fit for rock-minded kids/teens.

providers.name: Tremolo Guitar School
providers.notes: DBS-checked tutors, all levels; strong online structure covers Chalfonts/Aylesbury zone for electric and rock styles.

providers.name: Your Guitar Academy (YGA) — Aylesbury & London
providers.notes: DBS-checked, interviewed, trained tutors at hundreds of UK studios; dedicated rock and blues intermediate courses for electric guitar.

providers.name: Westmount Music
providers.notes: Rockschool and RGT@LCM accredited tutors; home visits available across Bucks — strong grade/exam path for serious rock players.

providers.name: Albert Lee Music School (Aylesbury branch)
providers.notes: Explicitly teaches distortion, palm muting, vibrato, string bending — core rock/metal electric-guitar toolkit for kids and adults.

providers.name: Albert Lee Music School (Slough branch)
providers.notes: Same curriculum as Aylesbury branch — closer to Welders; private adult and kids tutors on electric with rock-technique focus.

providers.name: Albert Lee Music School (Watford branch)
providers.notes: Rock-technique focus (distortion, bending, palm-muting); easy drive east from Chalfont St Giles.

providers.name: Guitar Lessons Watford
providers.notes: One of the most genre-broad tutors in the radius — explicitly advertises metal and slide alongside rock; strong Ozzy/Iommi bonus.

providers.name: Stuart Mason Guitar Tuition
providers.notes: 25+ years playing, 10+ years teaching; advertises metal and rock performance experience — strong West London pick for a metal-leaning student.

providers.name: London Guitar Academy (Rock & Metal Division)
providers.notes: London's only dedicated Rock/Pop/Blues school with a full Metal Guitar syllabus — shredding, palm muting, pinch harmonics, sweep picking. The Ozzy-legacy pick.

providers.name: ICMP (Institute of Contemporary Music Performance)
providers.notes: Launched as 'The Guitar Institute' in 1986 — industry-aligned rock/metal pathway; ideal for a serious teen-to-adult student following the Ozzy/Sabbath tradition.

providers.name: BIMM Music Institute London
providers.notes: Europe's largest music-education provider; alumni include Sophie Lloyd (modern metal) — strong competitive-rock/metal environment within a 50-mile radius.

providers.name: Rock Academy Foundation Reading
providers.notes: Tutors are Registry of Guitar Tutors members; 15-year track record on London College of Music electric-guitar grades — exam-ready rock pathway.

providers.name: James Holt Tuition (Reading)
providers.notes: One of the most explicitly metal/fusion-friendly private studios in the radius — serious genre depth for rock/metal learners.
